segments.text: I like our intimate little group.
segments.speaker: S23

segments.text: Brendon, what are you going to put down for Josie?
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: Oh, you know, well, you know, she's adopted.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: And her parents wanted to remain anonymous, so, you know, what do you do?
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: We think it's Don Ho and Arthur Kitt.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: Who'd you end up deciding on for parents, Melissa?
segments.speaker: S23

segments.text: And welcome to my family tree.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: As you can see here, my mother is the beautiful princess Cinderella.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: You may know her from such films as Cinderella.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: She and my father met shortly after he left the WWF
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: And just before being elected the first independent governor of Minnesota.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: Their names are Happy, Sleepy, Dopey, Doc, Grumpy, Lumpy, and Stew.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: And my Uncle Hulk Hogan comes over every week to read me bedtime stories.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: This is a reenactment of Pee Popo's cross-Atlantic adventure,
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: Coming to the New World to escape the Red Menace.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: Well, in America, you're just Pee Popo.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: All right, get in line with the other ferrets.
